name: libpython3-dev
title: libpython3-dev
summary: header files and a static library for Python (default)
description:
header files and a static library for Python (default)
Header files, a static library and development tools for building
Python modules, extending the Python interpreter or embedding Python
in applications.
.
This package is a dependency package, which depends on Debian's default
Python 3 version's headers (currently v3.13).

commands.name: x86_64-linux-gnu-python3-config
commands.description: output build options for python C/C++ extensions or embedding
